meta.disclaimer: Read-only synthetic demo data for project presentation. Not financial advice.

spec.name: Roadshow Multi-Factor Risk Screen
spec.description: A demo-only volatility-aware stock screening strategy with explicit timing, turnover, and stop-loss controls.

notes: Signals are formed after close and executed on the next bar.
Position size is capped for roadshow risk-control illustration.

assumptions: Synthetic roadshow fixture; not live market data.
One-bar execution delay is required to avoid look-ahead bias.
rationale: Trend filter reduces exposure during weak regimes.
Momentum ranking selects stronger candidates among eligible assets.
Volatility cap is used as a risk gate rather than a return promise.
spec.disclaimer: For research demonstration only. This is not financial advice.

issues.message: Roadshow fixture uses synthetic data; validate with production qlib/Wind data before research use.

timing_assumptions: 5 bps fee plus 2 bps slippage in the roadshow fixture
validation.disclaimer: Backtest output is for research and risk identification only; not investment advice.

backtest_summary.timing_note: Roadshow signals use one-bar delayed execution.

execution_model.return_alignment: positions from t-1 are applied to close-to-close returns on t

chain.regime_hypothesis: The topic may shift market risk appetite through policy expectations, supply-chain repricing, and volatility repricing. Current output is suitable for scenario analysis, not direct trading instruction.
cause: Public news flow increased around the selected topic.
Sector expectations may be repriced before fundamentals are confirmed.
Volume, volatility, and policy confirmation remain the key validation gates.
assumptions: Used for research and risk identification only

report.executive_summary: The selected macro topic should be interpreted through a chain of evidence: news credibility, policy or corporate confirmation, sector mapping, and market microstructure confirmation. The platform frames it as a research hypothesis with explicit risk gates.

market_dashboard.interpretation: Position sizing should remain conservative in a demo scenario.
Generate and backtest strategies before any production research use.

report.disclaimer: For research demonstration only. This is not financial advice.

items.title: Policy expectations drive renewed attention to advanced manufacturing themes
Market breadth improves but volatility confirmation remains mixed
Institutional desks focus on risk control and scenario-based allocation

highlights: News heat is elevated but still requires confirmation.
Risk regime remains mixed, so the platform keeps output in observe/test mode.
The workflow connects macro events to candidate assets, risk gates, and backtestable strategy hypotheses.
